ab: siRab, matiw iku sa damu melaut tu baqi ku.
ch: 昨天，我去部落拜訪爺爺。
en: Yesterday, I went to visit my grandpa in the tribe.

ab: tennes ti imi mai simqatazay, sizenges iku timaizipana.
ch: 我們很久沒有見面了，我很想念他。
en: We haven’t seen each other for a long time and I miss him a lot.

ab: taytan na iku na baqi, paqanan na tu pelulu, pananuman na tu ucia.
ch: 爺爺一看到我，就請我吃西瓜，請我喝茶。
en: As soon as grandpa saw me, he invited me to eat watermelon and drink tea.

ab: datebus nipaluman na baqi tu pelulu, maken nengi qanan.
ch: 爺爺種的西瓜很甜，真的很好吃。
en: The watermelon grown by grandpa is very sweet and really delicious.

ab: melizaq iku menanum tu ucia ni baqi, nengi nanuman.
ch: 我也喜歡爺爺的茶，也很好喝。
en: I also like grandpa’s tea, it’s tasted good too.

ab: tutu ti nani, masulun iku tu bai ku meRamaz tu satutuan.
ch: 中午的時候，我和奶奶一起煮午餐。
en: At noon, I cooked lunch with my grandma.

ab: muwaza niRamazan na ni bai tu satutuan, yau baut, yau taquq, yau salu seRay luli.
ch: 奶奶煮了很豐盛的午餐，有魚、有雞、有南瓜、還有蝸牛。
en: Grandma cooked a big lunch, including fish, chicken, pumpkin, and snails.

ab: pun ti qeman satutu, matiw imi sa bawbi qaytenned.
ch: 吃完午餐後，我們去菜園摘菜。
en: After lunch, we went to the vegetable garden to pick vegetables.

ab: mala ti ti bai tu muwaza qawpiR, sebata seRay dukiyu bula timaikuan, sapatananan ku.
ch: 奶奶拿了很多地瓜、芋頭和蕗蕎給我，要我帶回家。
en: Grandma brought me a lot of sweet potatoes, taro and buckwheat, and asked me to take them home.

ab: qawi ti iku zin ku ta qaniauan, sanuan ku tu qawtuan muman temayta ta qaniauan.
ch: 我跟他們道別，說下次再去看他們。
en: I said goodbye to them and said I’d see them next time.
